response.justification: Candidate has broad full-stack experience across many languages and domains, but lacks the core requirements for this role. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), well short of the 5-10 years required. No Windows platform focus, no SQL Server/Oracle experience demonstrated, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. Recent work is concentrated in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not C++.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and testing focus
Polyglot developer with experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching experience
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience, far below the 5-10 year requirement
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or Windows platform development
Zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains

key_factors.factor: Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform experience
